overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game featuring an FBI agent exploring a dark morgue facility. The character moves from a storage area through corridors into an examination room where a body and other characters are present, with atmospheric low-lighting and flashlight illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark storage room with metal shelving

events.description: character turns away from storage box and proceeds down dark corridor with flashlight

agents.ego_description: examining a storage box with green marking using flashlight, then moving through dark corridor

entered.detail: tall metal shelving unit with multiple levels
open cardboard box with green symbol on the side sitting on a shelf
narrow dark hallway extending into the distance
tall metal cabinet with drawers visible near the door

segments.scene_description: In a dimly lit storage room, the FBI agent examines a cardboard box with a flashlight before turning to proceed down a narrow dark corridor. The environment is claustrophobic with metal shelving and filing cabinets visible in the flashlight beam.

scene_state.functional_zone: institutional corridor with white tiled walls

events.description: exits dark storage area into lit corridor with white tiled walls
approaches and enters the morgue examination room

agents.ego_description: walking down the tiled corridor toward the lit morgue room ahead

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos standing near examination table in the next room

entered.detail: institutional white ceramic tile covering the corridor walls
overhead fluorescent light illuminating the corridor ahead
red janitorial cart with cleaning supplies parked against the wall
open doorway leading into the brightly lit examination room
metal examination table visible through the doorway with a body lying on it
covered body lying on the examination table in the adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The agent emerges from the dark storage area into a white-tiled institutional corridor illuminated by fluorescent lights. A red cleaning cart sits against the wall as the character approaches an open doorway revealing a morgue examination room with a body on a table and a shirtless man standing nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: morgue examination room with autopsy equipment

events.description: enters the morgue examination room with medical personnel present
stops approaching the table and turns to face the detective

agents.ego_description: approaching the examination table and engaging with the medical examiner and detective present in the room

notable_agents.action: tattooed medical examiner in scrubs standing by the examination table
detective in suit waiting near the examination table to discuss the case

entered.detail: metal tray holding medical instruments next to the examination table
tall metal storage cabinets lining the right wall of the room
large rectangular fluorescent light panels illuminating the examination area

segments.scene_description: Inside the morgue examination room, the agent approaches the metal examination table where a body lies covered. The room is brightly lit by overhead fluorescent panels with medical equipment and storage lockers visible. A tattooed medical examiner stands by the table while a detective in a suit waits to discuss the case, and the agent stops to face him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit storage area into a brightly lit institutional morgue. It begins with the FBI agent examining a cardboard box by flashlight amidst metal shelving and filing cabinets before turning to navigate a narrow, dark corridor. As the agent emerges from the shadows, the environment shifts to a white-tiled hallway illuminated by fluorescent lights, passing a red cleaning cart on the way to an open doorway. The scene then expands into a sterile examination room where the camera approaches a metal table holding a covered body. Finally, the movement settles as the agent faces a detective and a tattooed medical examiner surrounded by medical equipment and storage lockers under bright overhead panels.
